PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Continued To Apr-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Andrea Ditullio for John Kirkwood.

The Court raised the issue of insufficient time with notice of the corrected document. Ms. Ditullio stated that they served notice and sent the supplement, and that a copy of the will was attached to the original petition. The Petition for Probate of Will is continued to April 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proper notice.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2017 Continued To Mar-20-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
